zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Hastings於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可艾爾辛時，她的父親Sir Hugh de Hastings15歲，母親Margaret Everingham20歲。她於1374年4月與Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley在英國英格蘭諾福爾可摩利 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1380年之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Hastings was born about 1350, in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh de Hastings, was 15 and her mother, Margaret Everingham, was 20. She married Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley in April 1374, in Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 1380, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley en avril 1374, à Morley St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1380, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat im April 1374 in Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. ko.Morley, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 모를리 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hastings(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 엘징에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Hastings(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Everingham(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1374년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 모를리 스트 피터에서 Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Morley 4th Baron Morley апрель 1374 г. в местности морли ст питир, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1380 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
